examples.name: Email Drafter
examples.description: Drafts a short reply email. Pick a tone, fill recipient + intent, optionally add CC or urgency. Demonstrates conditional fragments and template variables.

examples.name: Trivia Host
examples.description: Quiz show host. Personality, sentiment + sass slider, and a wrong-answer runtime injection that filters the prompt down. Demonstrates the sentiment slider and runtime injections.

examples.name: Code Reviewer
examples.description: PR reviewer with two personas and a strict output policy (required '- ' prefix, forbidden filler phrases, retries). Demonstrates output_policy enforcement.
